meta_title: How to Lighten a Photo | Free Image Brightener
meta_description: Learn how to lighten a photo online. Brighten dark images, fix underexposure, and enhance lighting instantly and securely in your browser.
subtitle: Easily brighten dark images or fix underexposed photos. Adjust the brightness intensity and download your enhanced photos instantly.

tool_workspace.description: Upload your dark photos and use the intensity slider to brighten them instantly.
